data.title: Fitch Revises Vietnam's 2026 GDP Growth Forecast Due to Iran Conflict
data.description: Fitch Ratings has adjusted its forecast for Vietnam's GDP growth in 2026, citing the impact of the ongoing conflict in Iran. According to Jin10, the growth expectation has been revised from 7.2% to 7.0%. The adjustment reflects concerns over potential economic disruptions stemming from the geopolitical tensions in the region. Fitch's revision highlights the broader implications of the conflict on global economic stability and growth projections.

data.title: Polymarket Account Recovers $280,000 After Nets Victory Over Bucks
data.description: A Polymarket account, which had incurred losses exceeding $4 million, managed to recover approximately $280,000 following the Nets' win against the Bucks. According to NS3.AI, the account had previously invested around $240,000 in positions favoring the Nets' victory, priced at approximately 46.5 cents.

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks rose across the board, with AI stocks leading the gains at over 6%, and BTC breaking through $71,000.
data.description: On April 8th, according to SoSoValue data, the cryptocurrency market generally rebounded following the two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran. The AI ​​sector performed strongly, rising 6.61% in the past 24 hours. Fartcoin (FARTCOIN) surged 18.88%, while Bittensor (TAO), Worldcoin (WLD), and Render (RENDER) rose 8.56%, 8.94%, and 10.14% respectively. Additionally, Bitcoin (BTC) rose 4.30%, surpassing $71,000; Ethereum (ETH) rose 6.23%, surpassing $2,200. Meanwhile, MAG7.ssi rose 4.58%, DEFI.ssi rose 5.30%, and MEME.ssi rose 5.04%. In other sectors, the DeFi sector rose 4.41% in the last 24 hours, with EdgeX (EDGE) up 14.90%; the Layer 2 sector rose 4.32%, with Optimism (OP) up 9.51%; the Layer 1 sector rose 3.95%, with Zcash (ZEC) up 25.73%; the PayFi sector rose 3.86%, with Dash (DASH) up 8.77%; the Meme sector rose 3.56%, with SPX6900 (SPX) up 11.86%; and the CeFi sector rose 2.64%, with OKB up 3.92%. Crypto sector indices reflecting historical performance show that the ssiAI, ssiDePIN, and ssiNFT indices rose 9.27%, 7.08%, and 5.81%, respectively.

data.title: UXLINK releases Q1 2026 business report: Launches X-Agent and completes quarterly buyback.
data.description: UXLINK released its Q1 2026 business review, disclosing its progress in infrastructure construction and ecosystem development. Among the highlights, the project launched the decentralized AI social protocol X-Agent and began community testing. Simultaneously, based on community voting, 1% of UXLINK tokens were repurchased from January to March and deposited into the strategic reserve wallet. The report shows that UXLINK completed its Q6 airdrop and added the unlocked tokens to the staking pool; currently, the team and community's combined staking exceeds 4% of the total supply. The Q7 airdrop focused on the integration of AI and social interaction, with over 20,000 users participating. Furthermore, over 20 Web3 projects joined the ecosystem in Q1, and the company continued to expand in the Japanese market. UXLINK also stated that its FDV, market capitalization, and trading volume all declined due to the overall market downturn, with liquidity contraction in the Korean market also putting pressure on it. Going forward, X-Agent will be the core growth driver, and the company will continue to promote token distribution and ecosystem development.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold Receives Boost Amid Ceasefire, But Further Gains May Be Limited
data.description: Gold has experienced a much-needed boost, yet its potential for further upward movement may remain constrained. According to Jin10, the key factor is whether the calming effect brought by the ceasefire can be sustained. In the context of the ceasefire, the focus has already shifted.

data.title: In an NBA regular season game, the Nets defeated the Bucks, and an account that had lost over $4 million made a profit of over $280,000 in a single game.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, the outcome of the "NBA Regular Season Nets vs. Bucks Game Result" prediction event on Polymarket has been confirmed, with the Nets winning the game. An account that had lost over $4 million (address: 0x492442eab586f242b53bda933fd5de859c8a3782) profited approximately $280,000 in this single game. Odaily Seer previously reported that this account had purchased approximately $240,000 worth of Nets winning positions at approximately 46.5¢. With this victory, the Nets are currently ranked 13th in the Eastern Conference, while the Bucks are ranked 11th. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, anticipating changes before they are priced in.

data.title: Energy Prices May Continue to Pressure Markets Despite Ceasefire Agreement
data.description: On April 8, Phillip Nova analyst Priyanka Sachdeva reported that despite U.S. President Donald Trump's agreement to a two-week ceasefire with Iran, high energy prices may continue to exert pressure on businesses and markets. According to Jin10, Trump agreed to halt attacks on Iran on the condition that the Strait of Hormuz is immediately reopened. Sachdeva noted that while the ceasefire might lead to the reopening of the Strait, it does not compensate for the damage to energy infrastructure. She added that the true cost of the conflict will be reflected in fuel prices at gas stations and global inflation in the coming months.

data.title: CZ: Autobiography "Freedom of Money" Now Available in Some Countries
data.description: Binance co-founder and former CEO Changpeng Zhao (CZ) posted on X that his autobiography Freedom of Money is now available in some countries and will be released globally at 00:00 on April 8 (according to local time zones). He stated that all proceeds from the book will be used for charitable purposes.

data.title: STOCKS | Storage Chip Concept Stocks Surge in China
data.description: Storage chip concept stocks in China's A-share market experienced a localized surge, with Dawei Co., Ltd. hitting the daily limit. According to Jin10, other companies such as Netac Technology, Golden Sun, Shengong Co., Ltd., Cape Cloud, Dagang Co., Ltd., and Huahai Chengke also saw gains.

data.title: Iran's Ceasefire Plan Shows Discrepancy in Uranium Enrichment Language
data.description: Iran's ten-point ceasefire plan reportedly includes language accepting uranium enrichment in its Persian version, according to an Associated Press report. However, the English version provided to journalists lacks this wording. The reason for this omission is not clear. According to NS3.AI, U.S. President Donald Trump has stated that a complete end to Iran's nuclear program is a primary goal of the conflict.

data.title: Raoul Pal Highlights ETH/BTC Exchange Rate Dynamics Amid Economic Trends
data.description:
Raoul Pal, former Goldman Sachs executive and author of 'Global Macro Investor,' recently shared insights on social media regarding the ETH/BTC exchange rate. According to ChainCatcher, Pal noted that the current dynamics align with the business cycle, specifically the rise in the ISM index and increasing liquidity. He emphasized that the long-term chart remains constructive, with ETH maintaining its value relative to BTC since 2017. If the current trend persists, ETH is expected to outperform BTC over time.

Pal explained that this is intuitively reasonable, as ETH, being a smart contract platform, has a fundamentally different total addressable market (TAM) compared to BTC's 'store of value' attribute. While BTC primarily carries the total savings value, ETH can embody the value of economic activity itself. Due to this distinction, the dominance of smart contracts relative to BTC is anticipated to rise over time.

data.title: New Zealand Reserve Bank Monitors Inflation Pressures
data.description: The New Zealand Reserve Bank has announced that its committee is closely monitoring any widespread inflation pressures. According to Jin10, the bank is prepared to take necessary actions to bring inflation back to its target level. This statement underscores the bank's commitment to maintaining economic stability amid fluctuating inflation rates.

data.title: Raoul Pal Highlights Ethereum's Potential to Outperform Bitcoin
data.description:
On April 8, former Goldman Sachs executive and author of 'Global Macro Investor,' Raoul Pal, shared insights on social media regarding the ETH/BTC exchange rate. According to BlockBeats, Pal noted that the current trend aligns with the business cycle and increased liquidity, suggesting a constructive long-term outlook. Since 2017, Ethereum has largely maintained its value relative to Bitcoin, and if the current trend continues, Ethereum is expected to outperform Bitcoin over time.

Pal explained that Ethereum, as a smart contract platform, has a fundamentally different total addressable market compared to Bitcoin's 'store of value' attribute. While Bitcoin primarily holds total savings value, Ethereum can encompass the value of economic activities. Due to this distinction, the dominance of smart contracts is likely to rise relative to Bitcoin over time.

data.title: New Zealand Reserve Bank Discusses Early Monetary Policy Action
data.description: The New Zealand Reserve Bank has highlighted the importance of early monetary policy intervention, according to Jin10. Some members emphasized the need for prompt action, suggesting that additional data and analysis would provide clearer insights into medium-term inflation pressures. The discussion reflects ongoing concerns about inflation and the potential need for policy adjustments to address economic challenges.

data.title: Governments Integrate Crypto Architecture into Financial Systems
data.description: Sign founder and CEO Xin Yan highlighted the integration of cryptocurrency architecture into state financial systems. According to NS3.AI, Yan cited Thailand's issuance of approximately $150 million in tokenized government bonds as an example. Additionally, he mentioned the UAE's inaugural government transaction utilizing the Digital Dirham. Yan also noted that Tether's circulating supply has surpassed $180 billion, indicating the distinct roles stablecoins and central bank digital currencies (CBDCs) are playing in the evolving financial landscape.

data.title: U.S. Justice Department Opposes Dismissal of Charges Against Tornado Cash Co-Founder
data.description:
The U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) has expressed opposition to the latest request by Tornado Cash co-founder Roman Storm to dismiss criminal charges against him. According to BlockBeats, the DOJ stated that a recent Supreme Court ruling, cited by Storm's lawyer, is unrelated to the case and should not be grounds for dismissal.

Storm's legal team had planned to use a new Supreme Court decision from a civil copyright infringement case to support their motion to dismiss. However, U.S. prosecutors argued in a letter to the federal judge that the ruling pertains to a different situation and industry, and therefore should not impact the handling of Storm's criminal charges.

This legal battle highlights the Trump administration's conflicting stance on the cryptocurrency sector. While the U.S. government has shown some support for crypto policies, it continues to pursue criminal accountability for certain crypto project developers. As the situation stands, Storm may still face retrial, with the case potentially returning to court proceedings.

data.title: Shenzhen Composite Index Surges Over 3% in Early Trading
data.description: The Shenzhen Composite Index experienced a significant rise in early trading, with gains exceeding 3%. According to ChainCatcher, the Growth Enterprise Market Index also saw an increase of 3.73%, while the Shanghai Composite Index rose by 1.37%. These developments reflect a positive trend in the Chinese stock market.

data.title: AI TRENDS | DeepSeek Launches New Modes for Enhanced User Experience
data.description: DeepSeek has introduced two new modes on its website and app, enhancing user interaction capabilities. According to Foresight News, the "Quick Mode" is designed for everyday conversations and instant responses, while the "Expert Mode" is tailored for complex queries, requiring users to wait during peak times. The Expert Mode does not support file or voice uploads but offers a deep thinking mode for thorough analysis.

data.title: Arthur Hayes Transfers Significant Amounts of ETHFI and AUKI
data.description: Arthur Hayes has reportedly transferred 265,461 ETHFI tokens to FalconX and 3.55 million AUKI tokens to FlowDesk, according to Foresight News. The transactions, monitored by Onchain Lens, suggest a possible sale of these assets. The ETHFI transfer is valued at approximately $117,600, while the AUKI transfer is valued at around $19,600.

data.title: The U.S. Department of Justice opposes dismissing criminal charges against Tornado Cash developer Roman Storm.
data.description: The U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) has filed an opinion with federal court opposing Tornado Cash co-founder Roman Storm's request to dismiss criminal charges, arguing that the recent Supreme Court ruling he cited is irrelevant to the case. Previously, Storm's lawyers attempted to cite a civil judgment in a copyright infringement case as grounds for dismissal. However, U.S. prosecutors stated that the legal context of that judgment differs significantly from the current criminal case and should not affect it. Based on current developments, Roman Storm's case may still proceed to subsequent trial stages. (Decrypt)
